drive_file_searches.finding: Drive returned RA Grant War Room package files. They are planning/staging material, not an academic lead, TTO authorisation, budget, or institutional commitment.

Drive returned a white paper, academic validation sprint draft pack, War Room sheets, and workbook files. These support outreach context but do not prove an eligible academic lead or research-office commitment.
Drive returned unrelated skill/docs files, project notes, and the War Room. No TTO, authorised office, ACTASAP lead, or institutional budget evidence was found.
No Drive result for QUB Innovation.
Drive returned unrelated EIC and tool documentation, plus planning files. No Ulster Innovation Services lead or ACTASAP commitment evidence was found.
Drive returned the War Room workbook/sheet and operating log. No England farming/growing/forestry lead, farm collaborator, farm problem statement, or registered facilitator evidence was found.
Drive returned RA planning packs and unrelated manuscript documents. No farmer-led route evidence was found.
Drive returned skill/project documentation, RA planning packs, and the Future Leaders application PDF. No registered ADOPT facilitator or procurement/role evidence was found.
Drive returned project-decision docs, RA planning packs, Future Leaders material, and a template. No ADOPT Project Facilitator engagement evidence was found.
Drive returned RA planning packs and unrelated manuscript documents. No farming lead evidence was found.
Drive returned an HNC framework document. No on-farm trial site, farming business lead, or ADOPT collaborator evidence was found.

war_room_sheet_searches.finding: No ACTASAP row found in Funding Pipeline search range A1:Z200.
Matched 'Robotics Adoption Central Convening Body', not ADOPT grant route evidence.

Partner Map lists Queen's University Belfast, Ulster University, and InterTradeIreland as possible collaboration/advisory targets. It does not contain a signed/dated academic lead or ACTASAP commitment.
No farmer/farming lead row found in Partner Map search range A1:Z200.
No ACTASAP evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z200.
No ADOPT evidence row found in Evidence Register search range A1:Z200.
No ACTASAP tracker row found in Application Tracker search range A1:Z200.
No ADOPT tracker row found in Application Tracker search range A1:Z200.

route_impacts.impact: Drive and War Room readback did not confirm an eligible UK academic institution lead, TTO/research-office authorisation, ACTASAP scope ownership, budget, or commitment evidence.
Drive and War Room readback did not confirm an England farming/growing/forestry lead, UK farming collaborator, farm problem statement, project facilitator, farm site, or budget evidence.
Drive and War Room readback did not confirm an England farm business applicant, registered facilitator, facilitator role, or procurement evidence.

controls: Google Drive and Google Sheets were read only.
Planning packs and partner-target rows are not treated as signed/dated lead, partner, budget, or commitment evidence.
No Drive file or Sheet cell was created, modified, moved, shared, uploaded, or downloaded as raw private evidence.
No IFS portal page was changed and no external action was performed.
No route was marked submit-ready from planning logs, outreach drafts, unrelated documents, or War Room target rows.
